pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_openproject.sh which creates the 'E-Commerce Platform' project with this identifier, and export_result.sh which queries it.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which selects targets using wp.subject.downcase.include?('search').
Confirmed via export_result.sh which checks for the presence of the 'search-initiative' tag.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data within the 'ecommerce-platform' project. There are exactly 5 work packages in this project that contain the case-insensitive word 'Search' in their subject (1 seeded by the environment, 4 injected by the task setup script). The verifier strictly checks that only these 5 work packages are tagged with the 'search-initiative' tag.
